title: Complexence lab experiment (EXP) front-matter
description: Validates the YAML front-matter of a .complexence/experiments/EXP-NNN.md file. Grammar only: the schema is public; the instances it validates are private lab data. See spec/complexence-labs.md §5.

id.description: Unique within the lab, e.g. EXP-001.

status.description: 'invalid' is a first-class outcome — a contaminated or artifactual run reported honestly (see ROADMAP.md).

depends_on.description: Public Assumption/Definition ids this relies on.

updates.description: Public Definition ids this would revise.

supports.description: Public Law ids this provides evidence for.

contradicts.description: Public claims this counts against; a confirmed one abstracts to a CEX card.

orientation_delta.description: Ordinal before/after change in orientation, in the lab's own units (labs §6.2). Null when not yet measured. NOT a validated cardinal quantity.
